site.title: TikPop
site.description: Creator subscriptions, realtime drops, and paid communities.

landing.title: TikPop starter for paid creator communities.
landing.description: The core stack is live on Vercel with Neon, localized email auth and a creator-first landing flow. Next layers are Google, TikTok, billing and realtime product features.

features.title: Realtime events
features.copy: Pusher is ready for live drops, chat and admin-side updates.

features.title: Google auth
features.copy: NextAuth and the Prisma adapter are ready to connect users directly into Neon.

features.title: Paid access
features.copy: The Stripe wrapper and subscription model are in place for the next step.

features.title: Admin speed
features.copy: shadcn/ui, react-hook-form and zod give the admin side a fast starting point.

signin.heroTitle: Return to your drops, members and paid content.
signin.heroCopy: Fast access for returning users. Keep the friction low and send them straight back into the product.
signin.title: Pick up where you left off
signin.description: Use Google for one-tap access or continue with a passwordless email link.

signup.heroTitle: Start a cleaner onboarding flow for creators and fans.
signup.heroCopy: Use one modal for account creation, email verification and future social login expansion without rebuilding auth later.
signup.title: Open your creator workspace
signup.description: Start with social login or reserve your account with a single email verification link.

benefits: Google login ready with Prisma-backed sessions
Passwordless email flow fits MVP scope better
Paid community access can attach to the same user model
authModal.googleDisabled: The Google button activates after adding `NEXTAUTH_SECRET`, `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` and `GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET`.
authModal.tiktokNote: TikTok Login Kit uses the authorization code flow and localhost callbacks do not work in production. We should wire this in the next step.
authModal.emailNote: Recommended setup: keep email passwordless. Auth.js Email Provider handles verification flow with materially less surface area than building password auth from scratch.
authModal.emailError: The sign-in link could not be sent right now.
authModal.emailMissingConfig: Email sign-in activates after adding `NEXTAUTH_SECRET`, `RESEND_API_KEY` and `EMAIL_FROM`.

signinPage.title: Sign in
signinPage.description: Google OAuth is ready as soon as the env values are added.
signinPage.error: The sign-in email could not be sent. Please try again.

authEmail.subject: Sign in to {host}
authEmail.title: Sign in to {host}
authEmail.copy: Use the button below to continue to your TikPop account.
authEmail.ignore: If you did not request this email, you can safely ignore it.

verifyRequest.title: Check your inbox
verifyRequest.description: We sent a sign-in link to your email address. Open the message and continue back into TikPop.
verifyRequest.note: If the email does not show up in a minute, check spam or request a new link.

onboarding.title: Create your brand profile
onboarding.description: This onboarding creates the business or creator identity behind your workspace. Once saved, the dashboard will use this profile as the default brand context.
onboarding.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell members what your brand or creator company does.

validation.name: Brand name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.slug: Slug must be at least 2 characters.
validation.slugFormat: Use lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only.
validation.slugTaken: That slug is already in use.
validation.description: Description must be at least 12 characters.
validation.alreadyExists: This user already has a brand workspace.

brandSettings.title: Manage your brand profile
brandSettings.description: Update the public and operational details tied to your creator or business workspace.

validation.name: Brand name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.description: Description must be at least 12 characters.
validation.unauthorized: You do not have access to update this brand.
